title: Umbra Poor Ores
description: An Exnihilo / SkyOrchards inspired Skyblock mod based on low income.
body:
An Exnihilo / SkyOrchards inspired Skyblock mod, based on being Poor, utterly penniless.

Discord Server: https://discord.gg/qZx9CGaW2z

Note: for 1.19.2 you will be required to spawn in your first generator, however with 1.20.1 and beyond it will be granted on first join (using advancements)

 

Current content:

- Adds Poorium, which is used to make the various generators, made by smelting Poor Stone Generator Tier 1 in a furnace.
- Adds Tiny and Small variations of the above and Poorium
- Adds Poor stone generator Tier 1 and 2
- Adds Poor Ore Generator Tier 1, 2 and
- Tier 1 Generates Stone, Coal, Copper and Iron
- Tier 2 Generates Stone Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Lapis and Redstone
- Tier 3 Generates Stone, Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Lapis, Redstone, Emerald and DIamond
- Adds Poor soil generator Tier 1 and 2
- Tier 1 Generates Dirt, Gravel, Sand and Clay
- Tier 1 Generates Dirt, Gravel, Sand, Clay, Red Sand and Water.
- Adds recipe for Crafting table and stick crafted from poor stone and small stone respectively
- Adds Nether Ore generatore Tier 1 and 2
- Tier 1 Generates Netherrack, Blackstone, Soul Sand, Quartz and Lava
- Tier 2 Generates Netherrack, Blackstone, Soul Sand, Quartz, Lava and Netherite
